title: Discovery
description: We align on goals, audience, constraints, and what success looks like. You share inputs; we ask the sharp questions.

title: Research & Strategy
description: We synthesize sources, competitor context, and key objections to build a clear angle and structure for the deliverable.

title: Drafting
description: We write the first version with your voice, your differentiators, and a conversion-first narrative—no fluff.

title: Refinement
description: We edit for clarity, credibility, and flow. We tighten claims, improve scannability, and apply LLM-friendly structure when relevant.

title: Delivery & Support
description: You receive final files plus implementation notes. We support you through revisions and handoff so you can publish confidently.
